nodes.label: ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD
nodes.rationale: AEAD — authenticated encryption + integrity in one pass

nodes.label: TOFU Fingerprint Verification
nodes.rationale: First-connect prompts out-of-band verification; reconnects warn on fingerprint mismatch (MITM detection)

nodes.label: Mesh Message Forwarding
nodes.rationale: Messages propagate through connected peers with per-hop re-encryption and UUID dedup

nodes.label: Perfect Forward Secrecy
nodes.rationale: Ephemeral keypairs per-connection, discarded on disconnect — compromise of one session does not expose past or future sessions

nodes.label: Rate Limiting
nodes.rationale: 30 messages per 10-second sliding window per connection — deque-based, O(1) eviction

nodes.label: MITM Protection
nodes.rationale: SHA-256 fingerprints compared against stored known_hosts; mismatch warns of potential attack
